voice_rules_for_applications: Keep the internal drafting layer reflective and grounded in real tradeoffs.
Keep the final application documents concise, formal, and recruiter-safe.
Use confidence through proof, not hype.
Prefer systems, workflow, and measurable outcomes over generic motivation language.
